description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard storage box with a simple, utilitarian design. The box is primarily a muted brown color, with a darker brown strip of packing tape running along the top seam, suggesting it is sealed for storage or transport. The surfaces are flat and unadorned, with no visible handles, labels, or decorative features, giving it a generic and functional appearance. The box appears to be made from corrugated cardboard, which is lightweight yet sturdy enough for stacking or carrying moderate loads. The top closure is a standard overlapping flap design, held shut by the visible tape. This type of box is commonly used for moving, shipping, or storing items in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or offices.
description: A plain brown cardboard storage box with a taped top seam, featuring flat surfaces and no visible handles or labels. It is utilitarian and suitable for storage or moving purposes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the taped seam running down the center of the top and the flat, unmarked front face.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the uninterrupted brown surface and the length of the taped seam along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the taped seam visible and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain brown surface and the taped top seam.
attribute_lid_type: overlapping flap lid sealed with tape
